description_long: This is a rectangular brick apartment building with three visible exterior walls, each covered in reddish-brown brickwork. The facade features a symmetrical arrangement of multi-pane windows, each window framed in dark trim and some with visible air conditioning units. The building has a flat roof with a slight overhang and dark coping along the edges. The windows are evenly spaced across three floors, with no balconies or decorative elements, giving the structure a utilitarian appearance. The brick texture is rough and weathered, suggesting an older, industrial-era construction. There is no visible entrance on any of the shown sides, and the building's overall design is simple and functional.
description: A rectangular, brick apartment building with symmetrical, multi-pane windows and a flat roof, featuring a utilitarian, industrial-era design. The exterior is rough and weathered, with no visible entrance or balconies.
description_view_0: The main facade with two intersecting brick walls, each featuring three rows of evenly spaced windows, and a flat roof with dark trim.
description_view_1: A side view showing the depth of the building, with three rows of windows and the flat roof's overhang visible.
description_view_2: A direct view of the main wall, displaying the symmetrical window arrangement and the full height of the building.
description_view_3: The opposite side view, mirroring the other side, with three rows of windows and the same brick texture.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in a symmetrical grid pattern, with three rows and four columns on the main facade, evenly spaced both vertically and horizontally.
